verdict_reason: Carries an unrelated hapi-pulse major bump alongside the search feature; node engine (>=24) still satisfies the new >=22 requirement so it is scope rather than compatibility

todos.issue: hapi-pulse is bumped 3.0.1 to 4.0.0 (a major, with a node engine change to >=22 and a joi 17 to 18 swap) inside a feature PR for dashboard search — unrelated to the AC and untested by anything in this PR
todos.fix: Split the hapi-pulse major and the @defra/cdp-auditing bump into their own dependency PR so a graceful-shutdown regression is not attributed to the search feature
